title: Aroma Naturals London Unscented Tealight Candles Pack of 50 | 4-Hour Slow Burn Time | Standard Size D3.8 x H1.45cm | White Wax Candlelight | Aluminium Cups Tea Lights | Bag of (50) Halloween Candles
features: Standard Size: Each tealight measures D3.77 × H1.45 cm, making them compatible with all standard tealight holders, decorative lanterns, wax melt burners and food warmers & hot plates.
Unscented: Perfect for those who prefer a fragrance-free environment or wish to complement other scented products without conflicting aromas.
Convenient & Safe: Each tealight is encased in an aluminum cup to prevent wax spills and ensure safe handling.
Extended Burn Time: Enjoy up to 4 hours of slow-burning light per tealight, providing lasting illumination for events, dinners, or relaxation.
Bulk Packs: Available in packs of 50 or 100 tealights, you'll have plenty on hand for weddings, parties, or simply to stock up for regular use.
Perfect for Any Occasion: Great for romantic dinners, weddings, Christmas, Diwali, Halloween, home ambiance, or relaxation.
description: Product description Create a warm and inviting ambiance with Aroma Naturals London Unscented White Tealight Candles, designed for clean and long-lasting burning. Whether you need soft lighting for a romantic dinner, a relaxing spa session, or an elegant event, these premium 4-hour burn time tealights offer consistent illumination without smoke or dripping wax. Each high-quality paraffin wax tealight is encased in a durable aluminum cup, ensuring safe and mess-free use while fitting seamlessly into standard tealight holders, lanterns, and decorative centerpieces. The classic white wax color complements any decor, making these candles perfect for home use, special occasions, and professional settings. Ideal for weddings, birthdays, Christmas, Diwali, meditation, spas, restaurants, and emergency lighting, this Pack of 50 tealights provides a reliable and elegant lighting solution. Safety Warning Keep candle away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning candle unattended. Monitor burn time. Dispose of candle remnants properly.
